rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE SOPHIE VERGARA SPECIAL NEEDS TRUST TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 9/14/22. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: There is no Exhibit B attached to the petition. The US Treasury Note 2.25% due 2/29/20 had a CV of $1,722,765.00 as of 12/19/19, but Schedule B (Gain on Sales) shows $1,725,000? The Massachusetts ST 50,000 PV 4.25% due 10/1/27 matured (?) on 10/1/21 with a CV of $50,000, but it was purchased on 3/26/20 for $50,918.00? An Apple laptop cost $4,549.43 in 2021? The spinoffs of Otis Worldwide Corp., Viatris Inc. (but .904 shares sold, not .094 shares?), and Organon should have been reported on the informational schedule along with purchases and other changes in the form of assets, not as "inventory adjustments". Court-conformed accountings are cash accountings. (Curiously, Schedule 1, showing the assets on hand at the beginning of the accounting period, was at the back of the accountingâ¦) How was the trustee's fee calculated? It exceeds the maximum amount ordinarily permitted by this court. The trustee's own fee schedule is not authority. A court-appointed trustee is required to account. Fees paid to a third party to prepare the accounting must be deducted from the trustee's fee calculated as a percentage of either the FMV or the income. It appears that notice was not mailed separately to Jason Vergara and Shirley Vergara. [CRC 7.51(a).] Some of the time entries for legal services do not appear to be reasonable, such as time spent by both an attorney and a paralegal to check tentative rulings or time spent to prepare and file the initial petition to approve the SNT, which was later withdrawn. This Court requires proposed orders to be submitted in hard copy; costs to e-file a proposed order will not be reimbursed. Why did it cost $100 to drop off an order on 7/21/21? A trustee that is a financial institution is not required to file original statements to verify its accounting. Notices of continued hearings are not required unless an amendment is filed. [Probate Code Section 1205 and CRC 7.53(a).] Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 9/2/22. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ANNE MARGARET TILLERY
rulings.Calendar Matter: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
rulings.Rulings: hearing. appearance required for the court to determine whether to remove the personal representatives (PRs). Counsel may be asked to explain the language in the verification to the response to OSC wherein the PRs state that they are "informed and believe and on that ground state that the matters state therein are true" which appears to negate the purpose of the verification, which is to have the person state under penalty of perjury that the foregoing is true and correct. in addition, the court may want to discuss the pending petition to appoint the private attorney for the PRs as the new PR of this estate, and the interrelationships with Counsel representing the suspended PRs and their private attorney. Please review Local Rule 14.1 D. for information regarding remote appearances. To appear by Zoom, go to Zoom.com and click Join Meeting, and use the ID and password below. Meeting ID: 875 8017 7925 Password: 722809 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Parties appearing should check in for the hearing using their first and last name.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ELEANOR W. MILLER
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 08/29/2022. Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. Endorsed-filed single sided courtesy copies are required for any papers filed with the court and must be received by Examiner in room 202 at the Superior Court. Examiners will not review any document until after it has been filed and a courtesy copy has been received. [LRSF 2.7, 14.7]. Courtesy copies dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the envelope or a cover page, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays. Petitioner must submit a hard copy of the proposed order to the Examiner in room 202 at least five (5) court days in advance of the scheduled hearing date. [LRSF 14.7]. Proposed orders dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the envelope or a cover page, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 8/15/2022 [LRSF 14.7 B.]

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF DAVID HUNG DAO
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Compliance Status Hearing
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. 1) The conservatee's interest in the real property must be listed on Attachment 2 and appraised by the probate referee. 2) The IRA must be listed on Attachment 2 and appraised by the referee, unless the IRA solely consists of cash. 3) The contents of the safe deposit box and tangible personal items listed on Attachment 2 must be appraised by the referee. New GC-040 & 041 forms must be filed. Based on the reported value ($240,353), a bond or blocked account may be required. 2) No GC-042 form is on file. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review LRSF 14.1(D) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF AIDA QUEBRAL ORQUIZA
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Sandy Orquiza Alvarez's (second) amended petition filed on 6/27/22 is continued to 10/10/22. Issue(s) necessitating continuance: Yet another "amended petition" has been filed, although it is now the SECOND amended petition. No proof of service of notice of the [second] amended petition has been filed, and no proof of publication has been filed either, as required by CRC 7.53(a). The amount of bond is missing from item 2d, although full IAEA authority is being requested and no waivers of bond have been filed or attached to the [second] amended petition. The petitioner is both a niece and sister of the decedent? Item 6 of the [second] amended petition is incorrect if the decedent's sister survived. What is the relationship to the decedent of William Orquiza and Rhena Orquiza Morales and Adeluisa Orquiza Cruz? Whose children are the nieces and nephews listed in item 8 of the [second] amended petition? [LRSF 14.18 C.] No Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number has been filed yet (confidentially and conventionally). Courtesy copies of any responsive papers must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 9/30/22. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF AIDA QUEBRAL ORQUIZA
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
rulings.Rulings: Leduvina Orquiza and Ely Sonny Orquiza's amended petition filed on 4/7/22 is continued to 10/10/22. None of the issues posted for the hearing on 5/23/22 have been addressed yet. No courtesy copy of the amended petition. No proposed order. Incorrect form of Notice. No proof of publication. No Acknowledgement of Receipt of the Duties and Liabilities. No Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number (filed confidentially and conventionally). Courtesy copies of any responsive papers must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 9/30/22. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF BARRIE LEE JOHNSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 8/29/22. (No earlier available date.) No courtesy copy of documents filed after 6/29/22 have been received yet by the assigned examiner (as of 7/20/22). [LRSF 2.7 B. and 14.7.] The petition caption is incomplete if IAEA authority is being requested. Not all waivers of bond appear to have been filed. There are two dates on the will. One appears to be a holographic "codicil" to the will. The proposed personal representative is required to sign and verify his own pleadings, including any supplement or amendment to a petition. [Probate Code Sect. 1023 and CRC 7.103(c).] Courtesy copies must be received by the assigned examiner by no later than 8/19/22 to avoid another automatic continuance. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.
